ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "ref_counts" INTEGER /* Number of reference alleles */,
  "var_counts" INTEGER /* Number of variant alleles */,
  "normal_cn" INTEGER /* Normal copy number at the mutation site */,
  "minor_cn" INTEGER /* Minor copy number at the mutation site */,
  "major_cn" INTEGER /* Major copy number at the mutation site */,
  "variant_case" TEXT /* Identifier for the variant case */,
  "variant_freq" REAL /* Frequency of the variant allele */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the mutation is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position on the chromosome where the mutation occurs */,
  "reference_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele at the mutation site */,
  "variant_allele" TEXT /* Variant allele at the mutation site */,
  "genomic_region" TEXT /* Genomic region where the mutation occurs */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation */,
  "mutation_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_variant_case FOREIGN KEY ("variant_case") REFERENCES variant_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Current treatment status of the patient */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Consent status for genetic data analysis */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of genetic diseases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient from whom the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., Blood, Tissue) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Site where the sample was collected */,
  "storage_condition" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the sample */,
  "sample_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sample */,
  "sample_prep_method" TEXT /* Method used to prepare the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study */,
  "study_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_cases" (
  "case_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each variant case */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient associated with the case */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* ID of the study associated with the case */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment plan */,
  "case_control_status" TEXT /* Case-control status of the variant case */,
  "phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype associated with the variant case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_cases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_cases_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_occurrences" (
  "occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation occurrence */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample where the mutation was identified */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* ID of the case associated with the sample */,
  "occurrence_date" TEXT /* Date when the mutation was identified */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the mutation (e.g., Confirmed, Pending) */,
  "occurrence_status" TEXT /* Status of the mutation occurrence (e.g., Confirmed, Pending) */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used to validate the mutation occurrence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_occurrences_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES variant_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_occurrences_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_occurrences_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation being annotated */,
  "functional_impact" TEXT /* Functional impact of the mutation */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the mutation */,
  "disease_association" TEXT /* Disease association of the mutation */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source of the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency measurement */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample */,
  "frequency_value" REAL /* Frequency of the mutation in the sample */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the frequency */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the frequency was measured */,
  "frequency_status" TEXT /* Status of the frequency measurement (e.g., Confirmed, Pending) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the change (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Researcher, Data Analyst, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "lab_affiliation" TEXT /* Lab affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the data */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of accessing the data (e.g., Successful, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation discussed in the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_drug_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "mutation_id" TEXT /* ID of the mutation */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., Resistant, Sensitive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_drug_associations_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_drug_associations_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "drug_description" TEXT /* Description of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)
